title: Tender Canadian Chinese Broccoli Grill
description: A cozy Canadian dish featuring tender Chinese broccoli, a sweet and savory glaze, all grilled to perfection on a binchotan grill, perfect for a low-sodium diet. This dish is a unique fusion of Canadian and Chinese flavors.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small saucepan, whisk together honey, soy sauce, rice vinegar, garlic, and ginger.
Bring the glaze to a simmer over medium heat and cook until it has thickened slightly, about 5 minutes.
Toss the Chinese broccoli with sesame oil, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl until it is evenly coated.
Brush the grill with a small amount of sesame oil to prevent sticking.
Add the Chinese broccoli to the grill and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it is tender and slightly charred.
Brush the glaze over the Chinese broccoli during the last minute of cooking.
Remove the broccoli from the grill and serve immediately.
